{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eithan's white spear
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] has a gleaming white spear that shines like condensed starlight.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
